subject: Deal page takes 15+ seconds to load when there are many linked items
body:
Hi,

I've noticed that deal pages with a lot of linked items (quotes, invoices, tasks, notes) are becoming extremely slow to load. For our bigger deals that have 10+ quotes and 30+ tasks, the page takes 15 seconds or more to fully render. During that time the page is partially loaded and I can't click on anything.

This is happening consistently across Chrome and Firefox on my desktop (good internet connection, 100 Mbps). My colleagues confirm the same experience.

Smaller deals with just 1-2 quotes load fine. It seems like the more linked records there are, the worse it gets.

Is this a known issue? It's really slowing down our workflow because we spend a lot of time on these larger deal pages during client calls.

Best,
Thomas
